# EDA filelists (VCS / Cadence Xcelium xrun)
# Generated by tools/gen_filelist.py — run: ./example.sh gen
#
# Each view under eda/<view>/ has:
#   incdirs.list   +incdir+ paths
#   vcpu.list      VCPU core RTL (verif_cpu_*)
#   rtl.list       SoC / bus / platform (view-specific)
#   tb_top.list    testbench top .v
#   defines.list   +define+ (optional)
#   manifest.list  ordered -F bundle
#   top.txt        top module name
#
# VCS example (package root):
#   vcs -sverilog -full64 -F filelists/eda/integration/manifest.list -top verif_vcpu_soc_cell
#   vcs -sverilog -full64 -F filelists/eda/full_campaign/manifest.list -top tb_full_campaign
#   vcs -sverilog -full64 -F filelists/eda/soc_manifest/manifest.list -top tb_soc_manifest
#   vcs -sverilog -full64 -F filelists/eda/soc_manifest_scale/manifest.list -top tb_soc_manifest_scale
#   vcs -sverilog -full64 -F filelists/eda/chip_top_example/manifest.list -top chip_top_example
#
# Xcelium / xrun example:
#   xrun -64bit -sv -F filelists/eda/integration/manifest.list -top verif_vcpu_soc_cell
#   xrun -64bit -sv -F filelists/eda/full_campaign/manifest.list -top tb_full_campaign
#   xrun -64bit -sv -F filelists/eda/soc_manifest/manifest.list -top tb_soc_manifest
#   xrun -64bit -sv -F filelists/eda/soc_manifest_scale/manifest.list -top tb_soc_manifest_scale
#   xrun -64bit -sv -F filelists/eda/chip_top_example/manifest.list -top chip_top_example
#
# Or compose manually:
#   vcs -f filelists/eda/full_campaign/incdirs.list \
#       -f filelists/eda/full_campaign/defines.list \
#       -f filelists/eda/full_campaign/vcpu.list \
#       -f filelists/eda/full_campaign/rtl.list \
#       -f filelists/eda/full_campaign/tb_top.list -top tb_full_campaign
#
# Helpers:
#   ./scripts/vcs/compile.sh   ./scripts/vcs/run.sh
#   ./scripts/xcelium/xrun.sh  ./scripts/xcelium/run.sh
#   ./scripts/iverilog/run.sh  ./scripts/verilator/run.sh
# See scripts/README.txt
